prompt: An aerial drone shot of an expansive, perfectly flat, {argument name="terrain color" default="vibrant green"} grassy plain stretching endlessly to a distant horizon. In the lower foreground, exactly two {argument name="animal" default="fluffy white sheep"} are standing and grazing. Bright, clear daylight casts sharp, dark shadows from the animals towards the left. Above the horizon is a {argument name="sky condition" default="clear, pale blue sky with a few faint, wispy clouds"}. The composition emphasizes the vast emptiness and scale of the landscape compared to the small animals.
translatedPrompt: An aerial drone shot of an expansive, perfectly flat, {argument name="terrain color" default="vibrant green"} grassy plain stretching endlessly to a distant horizon. In the lower foreground, exactly two {argument name="animal" default="fluffy white sheep"} are standing and grazing. Bright, clear daylight casts sharp, dark shadows from the animals towards the left. Above the horizon is a {argument name="sky condition" default="clear, pale blue sky with a few faint, wispy clouds"}. The composition emphasizes the vast emptiness and scale of the landscape compared to the small animals.

breakdown.creativeCore: Aerial View of Vast Grassy Plain with Two Sheep：Generates an aerial landscape photograph of a vast, flat grassy field with two small animals, emphasizing scale and minimalism.
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
